ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population type (e.g., Adult, Pediatric) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., survey, clinical trial) */,
  "data_collection_period" TEXT /* Period during which data was collected */,
  "data_collection_location" TEXT /* Location where data was collected */,
  "data_usage_policy" TEXT /* Policy for data usage and sharing */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the variable */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the variable */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Question text for the variable */,
  "permissible_values" TEXT /* Permissible values for the variable */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification */,
  "crf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRF name */,
  "sub_domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-domain */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "data_collection_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to collect the variable data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_sub_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_domain_id") REFERENCES sub_domains ("sub_domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_crf_id FOREIGN KEY ("crf_id") REFERENCES crf_names ("crf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cde_ids" (
  "cde_id" TEXT /* CDE ID */,
  "cde_name" TEXT /* Name of the CDE */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the CDE belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cde_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cde_ids_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_types" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population type */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the version belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crf_names" (
  "crf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRF name */,
  "crf_name" TEXT /* Name of the CRF (CRF Module / Guideline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_domains" (
  "sub_domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-domain */,
  "sub_domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
